title: dryopteris crinibulbon
intro: Dryopteris crinibulbon, also known as the Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, particularly in Japan, China, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris crinibulbon include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
